checks: Army Camp selected-unit inspector shows rearm estimate and rearm button.
Armory shows per-unit rearm estimate rows for selected weapon class.
Rearming 第4戦列歩兵大隊 consumes 28 Dreyse rifles from stock.
第4戦列歩兵大隊 weapon quality changes from 0.96 to 1.00.
Campaign top message reports the rearm action in Japanese.
Armory shows rearm buttons without page horizontal overflow.
Updated stock and quality remain readable after reload.
